EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed parameter "{object.type}" in the system configuration on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added parameter "{object.type}" to the system configuration on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} removed parameter "{object.type}" from the system configuration on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} moved parameter "{object.type}" in the system configuration on host {event_src.host}
